data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: anti-pattern scan from fix of 0a47-9631.

## Actual Behavior
ticket-edit.sh (legacy script invoked via DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1) uses declare -A fields at line 50 for argument parsing. macOS ships bash 3.2 which does not support declare -A. The script will fail on default macOS installations.

## Expected Behavior
ticket-edit.sh should use an indexed array or python3 for argument parsing, consistent with the fix applied to ticket_edit() in ticket-lib-api.sh.

## Fix
Replace declare -A fields with bash 3.2 compatible indexed array approach, mirroring the fix from ticket 0a47-9631.
File: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-edit.sh
Category: portability
data.title: [ticket-edit.sh]: declare -A requires bash 4+ -> fails on default macOS bash 3.2
